title: CK-12 Chemistry FlexBooks
description: A link-only discovery card for CK-12 chemistry textbooks and study resources.
license: CK-12 Curriculum Materials License · link-only catalog use

usagePolicy.reason: CK-12 currently restricts content aggregation and AI/ML use without permission.

pages.text: CK-12 chemistry materials span scientific measurement, matter, atomic structure, periodic trends, bonding, reactions, stoichiometry, thermodynamics, and organic chemistry.
Open CK-12 FlexBooks and search for Chemistry. Select the course and reading level that match the class.
Link only: CK-12 curriculum text is not mirrored or sent to AlloFlow AI features. Open the official CK-12 site to read, customize, or assign the material.
